Description: Students in good standing can take a maximum of 18 credit hours.
Students with borderline GPAs are restricted to 14 credit hours to stabilize their standing.
Students on academic probation are strictly limited to a maximum of 12 credit hours.
If this number of students fails a prerequisite across the program the course must be forced open next term.
A student must register for at least 9 credit hours to maintain full-time enrollment status.
